meta.description: EDEN demo scenario: CME detection → stockpiling → crisis → recovery. Full state machine for dashboard replay mode and demo orchestration.

phases.name: The Loneliest Farmer
phases.description: Dashboard live. All green. Sol counter ticking. Physical prop: LEDs warm-white.

agent_log.msg: Sol 247. All zones nominal. Soybean entering BBCH 65 — full flowering. Nitrogen fixation synergy confirmed: nutrient solution EC reduced to 1.6 mS/cm. VPD at 0.95 kPa, within target. Radish cycle 8 harvested yesterday — 1.4kg, crew morale boost.
Crew nutrition on track. Caloric coverage from potato: strong. Vitamin C via spinach + lettuce: solid. Cmdr. Chen's lettuce preference noted — next harvest Sol 252.

phases.name: EDEN Sees the Future
phases.description: DONKI CME alert. SENTINEL detects. Council convenes. ORACLE runs simulation.

agent_log.msg: Sol 247. CME-2026-0124 detected. Speed: 1,243 km/s. Mars ETA: 50.7 hours. Source: NASA DONKI. Instruments: SOHO LASCO/C2, C3, STEREO A COR2. Soybean in Protein zone at BBCH 65 — HIGH radiation vulnerability at flowering stage. Potato in Caloric zone at tuber initiation — moderate risk.
Running Virtual Farming Lab. 3 strategies evaluating...

Strategy A — Do Nothing: 40% crop loss, 3 sols recovery. Strategy B — Standard Survival: 12% crop loss, shields + reduce light. Strategy C — Pre-emptive Full Protocol: 3% crop loss, stockpile water, pre-harvest spinach, stress-harden wheat. RECOMMENDATION: Strategy C. Confidence: 87% (Syngenta KB stress data).
VOTE: Strategy C adopted unanimously. SENTINEL: shield activation. AQUA: max desalination. FLORA: pre-harvest spinach, stress-harden wheat nutrient mix. VITA: vitamin C buffer 58 sols — acceptable.

phases.name: Preparing for the Storm
phases.description: Water gauge climbing. Battery charging. Desal at MAX. Pre-harvest underway.

agent_log.msg: Water reserve at 340L. Need 580L for 5-sol storm autonomy. Deficit: 240L. Running desalination at MAX — solar still at 100%. ETA to target: 48 hours. Battery charging priority: 100% target.

Pre-harvesting lettuce and radish now — locking in nutrition before stress period. Adjusting soybean nutrient mix: EC from 2.0 to 2.4 mS/cm for stress hardening. DLI maintained at 17 mol/m²/day. She'll be ornery but she'll make it.

Pre-harvest lettuce + radish secured: 3.2 kg fresh greens. Vitamin buffer extended 58 sols. Cmdr. Chen's lettuce preference noted — saving a portion. Crew calorie reserves adequate for 5-sol reduced output.

Querying Syngenta KB: soybean radiation tolerance at BBCH 65... KB response: 'Legume flowering highly sensitive to radiation stress. Yield reduction 20-50% under elevated UV-B. Recommend radiation shielding and increased calcium in nutrient solution.' Shields primed. Activating on impact.

phases.name: The Storm Hits
phases.description: CME impact. Solar drops. Triage activates. Physical LEDs dim. Fan stops.

triage.action: BBCH 65 flowering — HIGH radiation vulnerability. Shields activated. EC increased +0.4 mS/cm for stress hardening.
Tuber initiation stage — moderate radiation risk. Monitoring. Potato is radiation-resilient but reduced light slows tuber growth.
Pre-harvested before storm. New seedlings protected under reduced light. Fast cycle — recovers in 30 days.

agent_log.msg: CME impact confirmed. Radiation spike: 263 uSv/hr. Solar output: 30%. Shields active. Zone isolation protocol: cross-zone resource sharing suspended.
Desal at 30% power: 36 L/sol. Deficit: 64 L/sol. Pre-stockpiled 580L — projected autonomy: 7.2 sols. Covers 5-sol storm plus 2.2-sol margin. We're good.

TRIAGE: Wheat salvageability 0.72 — RED, intervening. Tomato 0.85 — YELLOW, monitoring. Soybean 0.91 — GREEN, stable. Crew impact: protein output reduced 8% during storm. Eng. Volkov's calorie target: supplementing from stored rations. No scurvy risk — pre-harvest spinach secured.

Sol 249. Storm's here. Soybean's struggling at BBCH 65 — stress-hardened EC mix is all we can do now. Potato's holding, tough tubers. Lettuce pre-harvested, new seedlings sleeping under minimal light. Radish doesn't care — fast little plant will bounce back in days. We wait.

phases.name: Through the Storm
phases.description: Solar returns. Systems ramp back. Green creeping in. Fan restarts.

agent_log.msg: Radiation levels returning to baseline. Solar output recovering: 95%. Storm duration: 4.8 sols. Within predicted parameters.

Sol 254. We made it. Soybean lost 12% yield at flowering — better than the 20-50% the KB predicted without intervention. Stress-hardening earned us 8-38% yield saved. Potato resumed tuber growth. Lettuce seedlings perking up. Radish already sprouting new leaves.

Post-event analysis complete. Predicted: 3% total crop loss. Actual: 2.7%. Model accuracy: 90%. Proposing new flight rule: FR-CME-012: IF cme_speed > 1000 AND soybean_bbch BETWEEN 55-70 THEN pre-harvest all leafy greens AND stress-harden soybean EC +0.4 mS/cm AND shield priority to protein zone.

Crew nutrition restored to pre-storm projections. Pre-harvested lettuce + radish provided 58-sol vitamin buffer — never breached. Zero crew health impact. Cmdr. Chen enjoyed the lettuce. Radish already back in harvest rotation — 21 days to next batch.

phases.name: The Mirror — Mars to Earth
phases.description: Everything you just saw works on Earth too. Same architecture, different planet.
pitch_lines: Everything you just saw works on Earth too.
Swap dust storm for drought. Swap 4 astronauts for 4,000 farmers.
Same architecture. Same Syngenta crop science.
800 million people are food insecure. They can't wait for Mars. EDEN is ready now.
We built the loneliest farmer in the solar system. And it's the best farmer in the solar system. Because it has to be.
